string 2:
Welcome! If you're looking for clothing, you picked the
right place!

Chasing down thieves is fine and all, just don't put yourself
in harm's way, you hear?
Oh, hey. It's you! Welcome, welcome.
If you're looking for clothing, you picked the right place!
Let's go see Inori's dad.
There is no need to go this way right now.
It looks like this used to serve as the theater's ticket booth.

What is it about a limited-time special that makes you wanna
gobble it right up?
It smells like freshly fried croquettes here.
What's the market price for rooms around here?

The shutters have been down for a while now. No sign of
them coming up any time soon.

Wow, who knew there'd be such a variety of items? The human
world sure is somethin'.

Welcome! We've got plenty of fresh food, so come and get it
before it's gone!
Now listen up, you guys! This world we live in...

It's packed with loads of giant dinosaurs, robots and stuff
like that!

You guys are into that stuff, aren't ya? You'd be blown
away if ya saw it!

But it's a dangerous place! If ya don't toughen up like us,
there's no way I can take ya there!

Well, I was supposed to head to the colosseum, but a bunch
of little humans took a liking to me along the way...
It sure does make me happy to see them all having fun!

Maybe instead of being a warrior, my true calling is
bringing joy to people like this!
Hey, what's that?! It smells amazing!
Hm? You mean this croquette? You wanna try it?
Oh, yeah! Gimme, gimme! Let me have a bite!

There are so many tempting things here that it's hard to
focus on my training.
This is quite the dilemma...

What's this? It kinda looks like Hagurumon. Is it a part
for a generator or something?

Hey! Have a card battle with me!
Nobody around here is enough of a challenge!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
What's a card battle?
{end}Now is not the time.

Tch, you're boring! Fine, then. I'll just have to find
someone else.
Gah! I lost! I'll definitely win next time, though!

Guess you're not much of a challenge, either. Maybe it's
time I entered a tournament.

Wh-What do you want?! I've got nothing left to say to you!
Or are you here to have a card battle?

And here I was, all ready to face you, too! Could you be
any more boring?!
Whoa! You beat me! You're pretty good for a total noob!
Yeah! I won! I'd never lose to a total noob like you!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
This whiteboard has a bunch of documents posted to it.

Haven't gotten any new inspiration for a while. I wonder if
I'll be getting any good footage this time around...
Oh, you're back.

I suppose it would be a bit foolish to ask you how the
investigation went...

In any case, you're welcome to use this place as your base
for the time being.

Just don't go disappearing on me without saying anything
first.
You don't suppose... Hm?
Oh, it's you. Sorry. I was lost in thought for a minute, there.
You seem pretty busy yourself.
After all that commotion, I guess that makes sense.
I noticed Inori's been heading out with you a lot.
Just be careful not to go putting her in harm's way.

You seem capable enough, but still... I can't help but worry.
Please take care of her.
I've gotten a few requests. What do you wanna investigate?
Investigate the missing person case.
{end}Not right now.
Meet the person Hiroko wants to introduce you to.
{end}Not right now.
View the picture of Hiroko in high school.
{end}Not right now.
Investigate the sightings of phase electron lifeforms.
{end}Not right now.
Investigate the strange letter that arrived at the office.
{end}Not right now.
Investigate the missing person case.
Investigate the sightings of phase electron lifeforms.
{end}Not right now.
Meet the person Hiroko wants to introduce you to.
Investigate the sightings of phase electron lifeforms.
{end}Not right now.
View the picture of Hiroko in high school.
Investigate the sightings of phase electron lifeforms.
{end}Not right now.
Investigate the missing person case.
Investigate the strange letter that arrived at the office.
{end}Not right now.
Meet the person Hiroko wants to introduce you to.
Investigate the strange letter that arrived at the office.
{end}Not right now.
View the picture of Hiroko in high school.
Investigate the strange letter that arrived at the office.
{end}Not right now.
Not now.

*sigh* I'm so bored. I wonder if we'll get any juicy tips
today.

I'm curious about what's on TV. Turning it on counts as
investigating, right?

The news is on. There's no particular information of
interest.
I admit I'm curious, but I'd better not open it willy-nilly.
I tried knocking, but there was no response.
A fax machine. No signs of use.
I shouldn't peek in someone's refrigerator without asking.

It's a pendulum clock. I heard a bird or something pops out
at the top of the hour.

It looks like an anime poster. Must be pretty popular if
they're hanging it in the living room.
It's covered with a comfortable knob cover.
The shelves contain enough dishes for two people.
Breakfast is ready and waiting.

I'm heading off to school soon. Still, give me a shout if
you run into any trouble, okay? I mean it!
Aegiomon... said he wanted to be alone and headed up to the roof.
{next}He's still in shock.
{next}He'll probably forget about it by tomorrow...
{next}I bet he's in dreamland right now.
Yeah... I assumed as much.
You think so? I'm... not so sure about that...
I'll go talk to him!

Before we get down to business, why don't you take a look
at the living room?
...I'd say it's about time, wouldn't you?
{next}Let's head out.
{next}Hold on a little longer.
{next}I can't move a muscle until I eat.
All right, then. Off we go!
We'd better hurry. Time is of the essence here.

Well, aren't you relaxed about time! By all means, stuff
your face... and then let's get going, already!
Extra, extra! Read all about it!
(You hear a high-pitched female voice coming from downstairs.)

A mysterious dark shadow has been spotted around Shinjuku
Station! We'd better go investigate this, don't you think?!
A dark shadow...?! Oh!

That sounds just like what we saw before... back during
that whole egg-thief business!
Oh, you have a guest...? Wait. You seem familiar...
Oh, my gosh! You're the one... who was on TV yesterday!
Th-This person... is just cosplaying!

Oh, a cosplayer? Are you a friend of {player}? Wait! This is
no time for chit-chat!

Freshness is key when it comes to information! We're heading
to Shinjuku Station right now.

Hey, Ms. cosplayer! Come join us! Getting you in some of
the shots might get more people to comment!

Huh? I don't really get what you're saying, but... if you're
going to show me where the dark shadow is, sure, I'll go.

All right, then. Let's hurry and head out! Time to find
some content worth streaming in Shinjuku Station!

It's a relief not having to find a place to stay. And, this
way, I can avoid causing a commotion, too.
I still have plenty of questions, but let's talk tomorrow.

By the way, this drink... What did you call it? Tea? It's
pretty good.

Today was a busy day, so let's turn in for the night. We
have plenty to discuss in the morning!
Titans in the Digital World...

Even though I'm a Digimon, there's just so much I don't
know...
Like Inori, I want to ask Minervamon so many things.
Come to think of it, what was that business about an egg thief?
Ready to call it a day?
{next}[Take a rest.]
I wanna talk to everyone a little more.{end}
You should get some rest before it gets too late.

Anyway, let's go. Hiroko told me the place was a "back alley 
of Shinjuku."
I guess you really had a blast, huh, Aegiomon?
Come on! Hurry! Let's go!

Grin and bear it. To people who don't know your kind, you
stand out like a sore thumb.
Hey... Do I really hafta wear this all the time?
Zzzzz...
[Wake Aegiomon up.]
[Stare at Aegiomon.]
I'm... not... a monster...
Traces of tears seep out from Aegiomon's closed eyes.
(Maybe I ought to leave him alone for now...)
Aegiomon's not here. Did he go downstairs already?
I'll try talking to Aegiomon a little more when he wakes up.

Apparently, Inori provided these clothes for you. So
attentive. I'd say "caring" is the perfect word for her.

I'm sure she'll be helpful to you in many ways. You should
accept her kindness and change into these clothes.

I've added a feature to boost the synergy effects with your 
partner Digimon, strengthening the benefits of your bonds.
This feature is called {fc9Agent Skills}.

Agent Skills improve as you progress, allowing for accelerated
Digivolution and enhanced Cross Art abilities.
Master this function and use it to carry out your missions.

Voices, coming from downstairs... Let's go see what all the
fuss is about.
Do you want to go back to Rebellion Village?
Yes, let's return to Rebellion Village.
{end}Not now.

It looks like there's an arena somewhere in this city
where we can fight.

Some have gone to prepare for battle with the Titans.
I wonder if they made it there.

There's an arena in this city, but apparently there are
some strange folks there as well.

They're supposedly not warriors. I wonder why they're
participating.

Wow! There are so many buildings here that are bigger
than the Central Tower! I wanna climb one!

Everyone's just wandering around like it's normal,
but are we really supposed to be here?
You seem to be in quite a panic. What's the matter?
A giant weapon?! That's serious!

If that's the case, allow me to lend a hoof!
You need me to fly you there, right?!
Shall we get going?
[Head to the government building.]{next}
{end}[Finish preparing.]
All right, let's get going!

It's dangerous to go directly to the building, so I'll drop
you off nearby.
When you're ready to go, just let me know. I'll be waiting here!
